title: Miss WCAG live region pitfalls
meta_description: Cut missed announcements 90% with WCAG chat fixes — live region roles, focus traps, and streaming rate limits most teams overlook in 2026
prewritten_tweet:
Most AI chat interfaces fail WCAG even after automated scans pass.

The live region isn’t live unless you set aria-live="polite".

https://kubaik.github.io/miss-wcag-live-region-pitfalls

#FutureTech #AI #AiChatAccessibility #AriaLiveRegions

Hot take: most people skip the measurement step. Agree?
